title: pelargonium × triumphans
intro: Pelargonium × triumphans, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Geranium genus, characterized by its distinctive rose-like fragrance and pink to red flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin issues. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
